title: Port Facial quality, IQ, and dedupe plugin parity
operator_request: The operator needs Facial-quality image mining inside Handshake Ingest for LoRA dataset work; MT-019 proxy quality/dedupe is not enough.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Port deterministic native quality and dedupe behavior first. If an upstream feature requires unavailable model assets, emit explicit unavailable/degraded records instead of proxy-success labels.

scope.summary: Implement real native quality, image intelligence, and dedupe artifacts for Ingest using the MT-025 Facial registry/backbone.
base_scope: Port source-backed quality fields from the Facial app spec into Handshake rows and artifacts.
Implement deterministic image metadata extraction, exact-hash duplicate grouping, and review recommendations without proxy wording.
Add feature-family plugin modules for facet, python-ofiq, imagededup, and eDifFIQA-compatible outputs where native implementation is practical.
Materialize all outputs through Handshake ArtifactStore and keep original source files read-only.
Record unsupported model-backed quality features with source family, reason, and required configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Quality/dedupe rows no longer use handshake_native_proxy_v1 for implemented features.
Output fields map to Facial spec/source behavior with explicit source_family and feature_id.
Duplicate grouping is deterministic and stable across reruns for the same input order/content hashes.
Artifact content hashes are stable for equal inputs and differ when input classifications or source hashes differ.
Original images are never modified by analysis.
risks_and_controls: Risk: partially ported quality scores imply OFIQ/eDifFIQA parity. Control: source fields must identify native heuristic versus model-backed unavailable status.
Risk: dedupe collapses distinct images from filename alone. Control: exact duplicate grouping must prefer content hash and fall back to singleton with explicit reason.
Risk: large datasets reorder nondeterministically. Control: tests must assert deterministic sorting and hash stability.
verification: Fixture image tests for metadata/quality fields.
Duplicate grouping tests using repeated content hashes and missing-hash cases.
Deterministic rerun hash tests and artifact materialization tests.

manual_requirement: Required if this MT exposes or changes operator/model-visible Facial behavior.

summary: Added native Facial plugin modules for facet metadata quality, python-ofiq metadata vector output, exact-hash imagededup, and eDifFIQA unavailable records.
Updated Facial ingest analysis rows and summary artifacts with source_family, feature_id, method, quality_metrics, ofiq_quality, dedupe_record, and native_feature_outputs.
Kept metadata-only quality explicitly degraded and model-backed eDifFIQA/identity lanes unavailable instead of claiming model parity.
Aligned duplicate representative selection with non-destructive remove-candidate keeper policy.
Added @1 compatibility defaults for newly added serialized fields and changed internal row reparse from fail-open empty rows to fail-closed error.
Updated the in-product UserManual CKC/PoseKit quickstart with the Facial analyze route and output contract.
scope_expansions: src/backend/handshake_core/src/atelier/facial_native/mod.rs and plugins/mod.rs were updated for module wiring.
src/backend/handshake_core/src/atelier/facial_native/registry.rs and run.rs were updated so the native run report and registry match the new plugin outputs.
src/backend/handshake_core/src/user_manual/seed.rs and tests/user_manual_content_tests.rs were updated to satisfy the MT manual requirement.

passed: cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --test atelier_facial_quality_dedupe_tests -j 2 -- --nocapture (6 passed before post-review compatibility patch; critical compatibility/read-only/keeper assertions were then mirrored into lib tests)
cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml facial_ingest --lib -j 2 -- --nocapture (8 passed after post-review fixes)

cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --features test-utils --test user_manual_content_tests ckc_posekit_quickstart_is_native_first_and_reachable -j 2 -- --exact --nocapture (1 passed before post-review compatibility patch; manual files were unchanged after that pass)
git diff --check on MT-026 touched files
inconclusive: Final reruns of the full atelier_facial_quality_dedupe_tests integration binary and the manual content test intermittently exited/timed out during compile/link under concurrent Cargo load before a test harness verdict. No failing assertion was observed; the acceptance-critical checks were covered by passing lib tests and the earlier manual pass.
static_checks: Stale proxy-source scan found handshake_native_proxy_v1 only in explicit negative tests, legacy compatibility tests, and manual warning text.
Fail-open row reparse scan found no from_value(...).ok().unwrap_or_default() pattern in facial.rs.

findings_addressed: Representative/keeper mismatch: fixed by sharing largest-file-then-path keeper preference for duplicate representative and remove_candidates.keep.
Schema @1 compatibility failure: fixed by adding serde defaults for new row/summary fields and fail-closed row reparse; regression test added.
